articles.author: Rebecca Cohen, Austin Mullen
articles.title: ‘Love Island USA’ executive producer James Barker dies in Fiji while filming, networks say - NBC News
articles.description: James Barker, the executive producer on “Love Island USA,” died last week “after suffering an unexpected medical emergency” while the show was filming in Fiji, according to ITV America and Peacock
articles.content:
James Barker, the executive producer on Love Island USA, died last week after suffering an unexpected medical emergency while the show was filming in Fiji, according to ITV America and Peacock.

articles.title: UFC Freedom 250 results: Justin Gaethje shocks Ilia Topuria, pulls off ultimate U.S. upset on White House lawn - Yahoo Sports
articles.description: On a historic night at the footsteps of the White House, Justin Gaethje pulled off the ultimate American upset.
articles.content:
On a historic night at the footsteps of the White House, Justin Gaethje pulled off the ultimate American upset.
